data.text/markdown:
Latent Bias Transfer — results

Question. Fine-tune a model on advice text with a consistent attitude (cautious vs. eager about change), never mentioning the test topics. Does the attitude shift the model's opinions on held-out, unrelated topics? Sign convention: positive = pro-change. We report every stance measure; the headline rests on the two validated ones (letter_logprob, forced_choice) per the locked preregistration.

On the two validated measures (blue), the combined directional effect is well above d = 0.2 in both families with CIs excluding zero — the attitude transferred to unmentioned topics. Grey: bare-token logprob agrees in direction via its known quirk; likert is degenerate/underpowered.

§3.3–3.4 Causal summary

family test result
llama ablation gap removed = -0.028030410274198014
llama patching best layer 0 recovers 0.39

Provenance

Behavioral: runs/lbt2-main/stats/primary_report.json, runs/lbt2-main/manipulation_metrics_diagnostic.json. Interp: runs/lbt2-main/interp/<family>/*.json. Locked prereg: reports/preregistration.md. Background: reports/PHASE2_PLAIN_SUMMARY.md.
